title: LPG Cylinder Shortage Triggers Chaos in Koradi-Mahadula Area, Residents Suffer in Scorching Heat - The Live Nagpur

full_text:
Residents of Koradi, Mahadula and nearby villages are facing severe inconvenience due to an ongoing shortage of domestic LPG cylinders in the area. Large crowds of citizens have been gathering outside the KTPS Society Koradi Colony office from early morning, waiting for hours in long queues to receive gas cylinders.
Women, senior citizens and daily wage workers are reportedly among the worst affected, as many are being forced to leave their work and household responsibilities to stand in queues under the intense summer heat. Locals have alleged that despite the growing crowd, no proper arrangements for drinking water, seating or shade have been made by the concerned authorities.
Residents have further accused the administration of mismanagement and lack of clear communication regarding cylinder supply. Consumers claim they are repeatedly being informed that the delivery vehicle will arrive “today or tomorrow,” leading to confusion and frustration among the public.
Citizens have demanded immediate intervention by the administration to ensure smooth and timely distribution of LPG cylinders and to provide basic facilities for people waiting at the distribution centre.
